questions.question: Describe the difference between a process and a thread in an operating system. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Explain the concepts of process and thread, and provide a concrete example to demonstrate the difference.

questions.question: A process is created with a priority of high. Later, the operating system assigns the same process a priority of low. How might this affect the process's performance?
questions.hint: Discuss the impact of priority on process performance and explain how it might be affected in this scenario.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the wait() function in an operating system? Provide an example of how it might be used.
questions.hint: Explain the purpose of the wait() function and provide an example of how it is used to manage processes.
